title: The Boeing 787 Dreamliner
content_html:
The Boeing 787 Dreamliner

Until now, airliner fuselages have been made of aluminium sheets. Large aircraft can have 1,500 of these sheets with between 40,000 and 50,000 metal fasteners. The 787 is the first airliner to be built with a one-piece fuselage made from a special material called composite. Not only does this make the airliner quicker and easier to build, but it also makes it a lot lighter. The advantage of this weight reduction is that the 787 uses 20 percent less fuel than other airliners of a similar size, which makes it much more environmentally friendly.

Sometimes an airliner needs to change from one type of engine to another. This is a difficult and time-consuming process. The 787 has a revolutionary engine attachment on the wing which means that engines can be changed in a much shorter time. The case containing the engine is also designed to cut down the noise from the engine, making it less noisy for passengers in the cabin as well as for people on the ground.

In addition to a quieter cabin, passengers will also benefit from windows which are 65 percent larger than those on other airliners, giving them a much better view. The windows also have a unique facility which allows passengers or cabin crew to control the amount of light that enters them. This is thanks to a liquid in the window which reacts to an electric current. When a passenger or cabin crew member presses a button, the current causes a chemical reaction in the window which darkens the liquid.

(No comprehension questions set for this passage — reading only.)

questions.text: Composite fuselage material is much __________ than traditional aluminium sheets.
questions.question: Composite fuselage material is much __________ than traditional aluminium sheets.
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 1–7

Complete the notes below.

Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER from the passage for each answer.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
composite fuselage material
aluminium sheets
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"it also makes it a lot lighter"

Bước 3: Phân tích
it = composite material
lighter = nhẹ hơn aluminium sheets

Đáp án: lighter

_blockConfig.wordLimit: NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER
_blockConfig.noteContent:
- Composite fuselage material is much [1] than traditional aluminium sheets.
- Composite fuselage material reduces the amount of [2] that the airliner needs.
- Airliner can accommodate at least [3]
- Engineers can fit a new engine in a [4] than it takes on other airliners.
- A special engine case reduces [5]
- The size of the windows has increased by [6]
- Window glass can be made darker by passing an [7] through them.

questions.questionHtml:
• Composite fuselage material is much 1_______ than traditional aluminium sheets.
  • Composite fuselage material reduces the amount of 2_______ that the airliner needs.
  • Airliner can accommodate at least 3_______
  • Engineers can fit a new engine in a 4_______ than it takes on other airliners.
  • A special engine case reduces 5_______
  • The size of the windows has increased by 6_______
  • Window glass can be made darker by passing an 7_______ through them.

questions.text: Composite fuselage material reduces the amount of __________ that the airliner needs.
questions.question: Composite fuselage material reduces the amount of __________ that the airliner needs.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
reduces the amount of
airliner needs
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"the 787 uses 20 percent less fuel than other airliners"

Bước 3: Phân tích
uses less fuel = reduces the amount of fuel needed

Đáp án: fuel

questions.question: Airliner can accommodate at least __________.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
accommodate
at least
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"carrying 210 passengers or more"

Bước 3: Phân tích
accommodate = carry
or more = at least

Đáp án: 210 passengers

questions.text: Engineers can fit a new engine in a __________ than it takes on other airliners.
questions.question: Engineers can fit a new engine in a __________ than it takes on other airliners.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
fit a new engine
other airliners
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"engines can be changed in a much shorter time"

Bước 3: Phân tích
fit a new engine = change an engine
much shorter time = thời gian ngắn hơn

Đáp án: shorter time

questions.question: A special engine case reduces __________.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
engine case
reduces
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"It has been designed to cut down the noise from the engine"

Bước 3: Phân tích
cut down = reduce
noise from the engine

Đáp án: noise

questions.text: The size of the windows has increased by __________.
questions.question: The size of the windows has increased by __________.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
size of the windows
increased by
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"windows which are 65 percent larger"

Bước 3: Phân tích
larger = increased in size
by 65 percent

Đáp án: 65 percent

questions.text: Window glass can be made darker by passing an __________ through them.
questions.question: Window glass can be made darker by passing an __________ through them.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
made darker
passing through them
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"a liquid in the window which reacts to an electric current"

và

"the current causes a chemical reaction in the window which darkens the liquid"

Bước 3: Phân tích
darkens = makes darker
electric current passes through the window and causes the change

Đáp án: electric current
